preview_evidence: No UI code changed; review focused on whether the rewritten chart reads naturally in the existing songs workspace.

summary.rationale: The cleaned chart fits the existing list-detail songs workflow better than the raw MIR dump and remains explicit about its audio-derived origin.

notes: Named sections read more naturally than raw bar ranges.
The chart stays dense but more playable and scannable.
Turned noisy MIR content into a musician-readable chart without introducing a new UI pattern.

next_steps: Swap in a symbolic chart later if publication-grade fidelity becomes necessary.
